bank_defaults.cash_advance: 2.5% (Excluding Infinia, Infinia Metal Edition) or Rs.500 whichever is higher
bank_defaults.late_fee_tiers: Outstanding Balance -> Late Payment Charges (Excl. GST): Less than equal to Rs.100: Nil; Rs.101 to Rs.500: Rs.100; Rs.501 to Rs.1,000: Rs.500; Rs.1,001 to Rs.5,000: Rs.600; Rs.5,001 to Rs.10,000: Rs.750; Rs.10,001 to Rs.25,000: Rs.900; Rs.25,001 to Rs.50,000: Rs.1100; More than Rs.50,000: Rs.1300
bank_defaults.interest_free_days: 20 to 50 days (BizBlack Metal Card, BizPower, BizGrow, BizFirst, GIGA, Micro Enterprise Card: 25 to 55 days)
bank_defaults.source_section: Sections ii Cash advance fee (p.7), v Finance charges for both revolving credit and cash advances (p.10), iv Interest free (grace Period) (p.10), and Late Payment Charges table (p.11)
